title: ADHG Official
description: This is the official modpack for the ADHG Server.
body:
This modpack is the official modpack for the ADHG Server!


Even if you don't plan on using this pack for my server, it provides some good quality of life adjustments.

This modpack adds optimization, qol adjustments, and some visual enhancements.

Some of the additions include:

1. A mini map

2. Controller support

3. Ambient sounds

4. All the standard optimization mods

5. Shaders


This pack is all client side so it should work with most servers. (Provided they allow all the mods in the pack)
